name: tdd-crossover
hypothesis: Crossover: combine cand-0003's TDD generator (tests-first) with cand-0001's full adversary (8 challenges, 12 min). Restore DoD cap to 4/feature (cand-0003's cap of 3 was too aggressive, losing 9% DoD). Hypothesis: TDD catches implementation bugs earlier → adversary can focus on design/integration issues → higher DoD granularity than either parent alone.

changes.planner: Same as cand-0001. Coverage matrix + 4 DoD/feature cap restored (was 3 in cand-0003).
changes.generator: TDD flow from cand-0003: write failing tests for each DoD criterion FIRST, then implement until green. Feature-by-feature. But with cand-0001's 4 rules structure.
changes.adversary: Full cand-0001 adversary: 8 challenges, 12 min, reproduction commands + demands-for-evidence. Unchanged.
changes.evaluator: Unchanged from cand-0001. Zero-tolerance + progress delta.
changes.skill: Same workflow as cand-0001 (PLAN→BUILD→CHALLENGE→EVAL). All timeouts same.
